description_long: This is a detached suburban house with a gable roof, surrounded by a well-maintained yard featuring shrubs, trees, and flower beds. The front facade includes a covered entryway with steps, a prominent front door, and symmetrical windows on either side. A driveway leads to an attached garage on the right, with a car parked in front and another vehicle on the street. The house is painted in a light color with darker roofing, and the landscaping is bordered by hedges. The rear of the house is more private, with dense trees and fewer windows, providing seclusion. The overall design is reminiscent of a modern Craftsman or Ranch style, with clean lines and practical suburban features.
description: A light-colored suburban house with a gable roof, attached garage, and landscaped yard with trees and hedges.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, driveway, garage, and landscaped front yard with two vehicles visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and side yard with hedges and trees, with the roof's gable structure prominent.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by dense trees and hedges, with minimal windows and a private backyard feel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, driveway, and more of the landscaped yard, with the gable roof and vehicles visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with steps, a single front door, and small porch area bordered by landscaping.
